name: Port Wine Soaked Fig Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Dried figs, cut into quarters
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the figs in the Port wine for at least one hour or longer.
2. When the figs have absorbed a good amount of the liquid, add any remaining Port wine to the bread pan.
3. Reserve the soaked figs for later use.
4. Add the rest of the ingredients (yogurt, honey, salt, whole-wheat flour, cornmeal, bread flour, nonfat dry milk powder, and yeast) to the pan.
5. Bake according to the manufacturer's instructions.
6. Add the figs during the raisin-bread cycle or five minutes before the final kneading is complete.
7. Makes 1-1/2 lb loaf.
